title: Admin can access setting page
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps:
1. Login as an Admin
2. Navigate to the Setting Page ("หน้าตั้งค่า")
expectedResult: The user successfully accesses the Setting Page and is permitted to edit data

title: Non-admin is denied access
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in but not an Admin
steps: 1. Attempt to open the Setting Page URL directly
expectedResult: The system denies access and redirects or shows an unauthorized error

title: Create workgroup
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
testData: Valid workgroup details (Name, Procurement Method, Unit Head, Staff)
steps:
1. Navigate to workgroup settings
2. Create a new workgroup ("กลุ่มงาน") and fill in all valid details
3. Save
expectedResult: The system successfully creates and saves the new workgroup with all assigned members and properties

title: Edit workgroup
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps:
1. Select an existing workgroup to edit
2. Modify its details and save
expectedResult: The system successfully updates and saves the modified workgroup information

title: Required Workgroup Name
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Attempt to save a workgroup with a blank Workgroup Name field
expectedResult: The system blocks the save and displays a validation error for the required field

title: Required Procurement Method
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Attempt to save a workgroup with a blank Procurement Method ("วิธีการจัดหา") field
expectedResult: The system blocks the save and displays a validation error for the required field

title: Required Unit Head
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Attempt to save a workgroup with a blank Unit Head ("หัวหน้ากลุ่มงาน") field
expectedResult: The system blocks the save and displays a validation error for the required field

title: Procurement method unique across groups
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
testData: A Procurement Method already used by another workgroup
steps:
1. Select the already-in-use Procurement Method for a different workgroup
2. Attempt to save
expectedResult: The system blocks the save and alerts that the procurement method is a duplicate/already in use

title: Dropdown shows only available staff
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Open the staff assignment dropdown for a workgroup
expectedResult: The dropdown displays only staff members who are not currently assigned to any other workgroup

title: Dropdown hides Unit Heads of other groups
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Open the staff assignment dropdown
expectedResult: The dropdown actively hides any personnel who are already serving as Unit Heads in other workgroups

title: Dropdown hides staff of other groups
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Open the staff assignment dropdown
expectedResult: The dropdown actively hides any personnel who are already assigned to other workgroups

title: Dropdown hides Dept Head
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Open the staff assignment dropdown
expectedResult: The dropdown actively hides the Department Head ("ผู้อำนวยการ สบง") from the selectable options

title: Warning acting head overlap
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
testData: A person who is already a Unit Head of another group
steps: 1. Select this person as an Acting Head for a different workgroup
expectedResult: The system displays a warning regarding the overlap and requires confirmation before saving

title: Acting start date required
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps:
1. Assign an acting Unit Head but leave the acting start date ("วันที่เริ่มต้นรักษาการ") empty
2. Attempt to save
expectedResult: The system blocks the save and forces the user to input the acting start date

title: Acting start date future only
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps:
1. Select a past date as the acting start date
2. Attempt to save
expectedResult: The system rejects the past date and blocks the save

title: Acting end after start
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
testData: An end date that is earlier than or equal to the start date
steps:
1. Select an invalid end date
2. Attempt to save
expectedResult: The system rejects the date logic and blocks the save

title: Permanent head replacement
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Assign a new Head with a start date but explicitly provide no end date
expectedResult: The system processes this as a permanent Unit Head replacement effective from the specified start date

title: Auto update acting head
prerequisites: 1. An acting Unit Head is scheduled with a future start date
steps: 1. Simulate the system time reaching 00:00 of the specified start date
expectedResult: The system automatically updates the active Unit Head to the newly designated acting person without manual intervention

title: Add/Edit representatives
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps:
1. Navigate to the Representative ("ตัวแทนหน่วยงาน") settings
2. Add or Edit representative records
expectedResult: The Admin is able to successfully add or edit the representative assignments

title: Dropdown shows all departments and divisions
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Open the department/division assignment dropdown
expectedResult: The system accurately lists all available departments ("หน่วยงาน") and divisions ("ฝ่าย")

title: One person one department
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
testData: A person already assigned as a representative for Department A
steps: 1. Attempt to assign the same person as a representative for Department B
expectedResult: The system blocks the cross-department assignment, enforcing a strict one-person-one-department rule

title: Support representative per division
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Assign a representative to a specific division ("ฝ่าย") rather than an entire department
expectedResult: The system successfully saves the assignment at the division granularity (1 rep per division)

title: Support multiple divisions per representative
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Assign a single representative to multiple divisions within the same department
expectedResult: The system correctly records the representative as managing multiple divisions simultaneously

title: Department Head unique
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Attempt to appoint a second Department Head ("ผู้อำนวยการ สบง") simultaneously
expectedResult: The system denies the action, ensuring there is strictly no more than 1 Department Head at any given time

title: Department Head acting/new appointment requires start date
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps:
1. Appoint a new or acting Department Head
2. Leave the start date empty and attempt to save
expectedResult: The system forces the user to input the required start date

title: Department Head start future only
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps:
1. Select a past date as the acting start date for the Department Head
2. Attempt to save
expectedResult: The system rejects the past date and blocks the save

title: Department Head end after start
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
testData: An end date that is earlier than or equal to the start date
steps:
1. Select an invalid end date for the Department Head
2. Attempt to save
expectedResult: The system rejects the date logic and blocks the save

title: Add staff role
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Add a staff member to a specific system role
expectedResult: The system successfully maps and saves the staff member to the new role

title: Delete staff role
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Remove the staff member from the system role
expectedResult: The system successfully deletes the role mapping for that staff member

title: Multiple staff per role
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Add multiple different staff members to the exact same system role
expectedResult: The system supports and successfully saves multiple users sharing 1 role

title: Dropdown procurement department only
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Open the dropdown to assign Procurement roles
expectedResult: The dropdown strictly filters to display only staff belonging to the Procurement department

title: One person multiple roles
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an Admin
steps: 1. Assign a single person to multiple distinct roles (e.g., Admin + Procurement Staff, or Admin + Unit Head)
expectedResult: The system fully supports overlapping distinct roles for one person and saves correctly

title: Verify successful login via CU Net with valid credentials
prerequisites: 1. User possesses a valid, active CU Net account
steps:
1. Enter valid username and password on the Login Page
2. Click Login
expectedResult: The system successfully returns a valid JWT and redirects the user to the Home Page

title: Verify login rejection with invalid credentials
prerequisites: 1. User is on the Login Page
steps:
1. Enter an invalid username or incorrect password
2. Click Login
expectedResult: The system returns a 401 Unauthorized status code and prominently displays a red error message to the user

title: Verify login rejection for suspended accounts
prerequisites: 1. User account is flagged as suspended in CU Net
steps: 1. Attempt to login with the suspended CU Net account credentials
expectedResult: The system returns a 401 Unauthorized status code and explicitly displays an "account suspended" message

title: Guest role access limitations
prerequisites: 1. User holds only the GUEST role
steps:
1. Login as the GUEST user
2. Attempt to directly access the projects list, dashboards, or settings page via UI or URL
expectedResult: The user is forcefully redirected to the request-access/pending approval page; all functional backend API requests return 403 Forbidden

title: General staff role access limits
prerequisites: 1. User holds only the GENERAL_STAFF role
steps:
1. Login as GENERAL_STAFF
2. Attempt to open Settings, or attempt to delete a project
expectedResult: The Settings menu is visually hidden. Accessing direct routes redirects to an unauthorized page. Attempting to delete a project returns 403 Forbidden

title: IDOR prevention on Project details access
prerequisites: 1. User is an active representative assigned to Unit A
testData: Project ID belonging strictly to Unit B
steps: 1. Attempt to execute a GET request to `/api/projects/:id` for the Unit B project using the Unit A token
expectedResult: The system actively prevents cross-unit data access and returns a strict 403 Forbidden error

title: Admin views audit logs with pagination
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as an Admin or Super Admin
steps:
1. Navigate to the Audit Log page
2. Request page 2 with a limit of 50 items
expectedResult: The system successfully processes the query and returns paginated log details mapped correctly with metadata

title: Unauthorized access to audit logs is blocked
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as Guest or General Staff
steps: 1. Execute a GET request to `/api/admin/audit-logs`
expectedResult: The system immediately returns a 403 Forbidden error and logs the unauthorized access attempt

title: Filter audit logs by Operator and Date Range
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as an Admin
steps: 1. Search logs specifying a specific Operator string alongside start_date and end_date constraints
expectedResult: The system dynamically returns an accurately filtered audit log list matching the exact search parameters

title: Richer audit query filtering
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as an Admin
steps:
1. Open Audit Log settings
2. Filter specifically by action: "status update", entity: "project", and operator: "User A"
expectedResult: The API returns precisely matched paginated audit logs conforming to the complex query

title: Display user profile with multi-unit affiliation
prerequisites: 1. User is assigned to multiple distinct units within the system
steps:
1. Login with the multi-unit user account
2. Navigate to and view the Profile Component
expectedResult: The UI clearly displays all affiliated units and outlines the precise roles held per unit

title: Display correct role hierarchy
prerequisites: 1. User account simultaneously holds both ADMIN and HEAD_OF_UNIT roles
steps: 1. Navigate to the user profile
expectedResult: The system processes the role weight and prominently displays ADMIN as the primary prioritized role

title: Multi-role and unit display check
prerequisites: 1. Administrator is preparing an account
steps:
1. Assign a user to multiple units with differing roles
2. Open the user's profile page
expectedResult: All mapped units, roles, names, emails, and display priorities render structurally and accurately on screen

title: Delete unit strictly limited to Admin
prerequisites: 1. User is logged in as a Head of Department
steps: 1. Attempt to execute DELETE `/api/units/:id` within the settings page
expectedResult: The action is blocked and the system returns a 403 Forbidden error (Admin rights required)

title: Rejection of duplicate unit representative on edit/create
prerequisites: 1. Unit A already has User A assigned as its active representative
steps: 1. Admin attempts to assign User B as the representative of Unit A without removing User A
expectedResult: The action is blocked with a validation message stating: "Unit already has a representative. Include them in remove_users to replace."

title: Access restriction update after role change
prerequisites: 1. User A is currently a GUEST
steps:
1. Log in as User A and attempt accessing `/app/projects`
2. Admin modifies User A mapping to department with role REPRESENTATIVE
3. User A re-logs in and attempts to access `/app/projects`
expectedResult: 1. Access is initially blocked. 2. Post-update, User A gains full access to projects, and new scope actions are applied correctly.

title: Delegation date window gate enforcement
prerequisites: 1. User A creates a delegation for User B active from Date X to Date Y
steps:
1. User B attempts delegator actions before Date X
2. User B attempts actions between Date X and Date Y
3. User B attempts actions after Date Y
expectedResult: 1. Access denied before X. 2. Access successfully allowed between X and Y. 3. Access strictly denied after Y.

title: Contrast ratio and font weight check
prerequisites: 1. Tester is inspecting the UI layer
steps:
1. Inspect CSS stylesheets and verify contrast ratios for text labels
2. Check if bold styling is properly applied to system headers
expectedResult: The contrast ratio strictly complies with accessibility standards (minimum 4.5:1), and font weights display correctly as bold/dark

title: Swagger UI accessibility and metadata check
prerequisites: 1. Developer or Tester is verifying API endpoints
steps: 1. Open the `/api-docs` endpoint in a web browser
expectedResult: The Swagger UI reliably loads, listing all active v1 API endpoints inclusive of parameters and response models
